colleagues.name: Marcelo Tobias
colleagues.content: Marcelo has been both a technical and human reference during key moments of my professional growth. We worked together at Autotrac, at Ilia/Livelo, and now at Sicoob, and even earlier at Naintec in the late 1990s and early 2000s, when I was still an intern. Working alongside him raised my level of collaboration, ownership, and product vision.
colleagues.testimonial: Marcelo, your partnership has been essential to my growth as an engineer and as a person. Working with you taught me a lot. Thank you for always lifting the team with clarity, generosity, and excellence.

colleagues.name: Rodrigo Freitas
colleagues.content: Rodrigo was an exceptional leader and manager in both opportunities when we worked together at SEDF and SEDES, where he served as Undersecretary. He is a wonderful person who supported me in a very important and decisive moment and opened major opportunities for my growth.
colleagues.testimonial: Rodrigo, I learned a lot from you about partnership and trust. Thank you for your support, confidence, and the opportunities you gave me. From a great colleague to a great friend.
